heading: Wednesday Night
text: Variable clouds. Chance of showers and thunderstorms, except likely in the Adirondacks, and near the international border; severe storms possible. Lows from the upper 60s to mid 70s. Winds diminishing to light and variable.

heading: Thursday
text: Mostly to partly sunny. Scattered showers and thunderstorms, mainly north and in the afternoon; any storms could be severe. Highs in the mid to upper 90s in southern valleys and in the Champlain Valley, low to mid 90s in northern valleys elsewhere. West to southwest winds 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Thursday Night
text: A few clouds. Chance of an evening thunderstorm, potentially severe. Lows from the upper 60s to mid 70s, some upper 70s possible in the Champlain Valley. West to southwest winds 5 to 10 mph early, then diminishing.
